<features>
- observable feature: petal shape
- observable feature: petal color
- observable feature: flower size
</features>
<kb>
- IF [petal shape = rounded AND petal color = white AND flower size = large] THEN [86]
- IF [petal shape = pointed AND petal color = purple AND flower size = small] THEN [83]
- IF [petal shape = rounded AND petal color = yellow AND flower size = large] THEN [82]
- IF [petal shape = pointed AND petal color = pink AND flower size = small] THEN [12]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The Query Image has: petal shape = rounded, petal color = white, and flower size = large. 
- Rule fired: IF [petal shape = rounded AND petal color = white AND flower size = large] THEN [86].
</rule_check>

<response>86</response>
